zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Brooks於1667年5月6日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德時，她的父親Gershom Brooks43歲，母親Hannah Eccles20歲。她於1690年5月27日與Edward Bridge在美國德拉瓦州劍橋大學默里 卡素結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1724年7月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Brooks于1667年5月6日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德时，她的父亲Gershom Brooks43岁，母亲Hannah Eccles20岁。她于1690年5月27日与Edward Bridge在美国特拉华州劍橋大學默里 卡素结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1724年7月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brooks
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: usually a variant of Brook , with excrescent -s. The optional addition of -s, with no grammatical function, is usually post-medieval, but some examples of the same person's name occurring with and without -(e)s have been noted as early as the 14th century in South Lancashire. The -es in such cases probably has neither a plural nor a genitival function, and the name means ‘dweller at the brook’, not ‘dweller at the brooks’. A plural sense cannot be ruled out elsewhere, but a non-grammatical -(e)s must also be considered a strong possibility.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Brucks
meanings: probably a habitational name from Brucks (also Brux) which derives from Middle Low German brōk ‘low-lying marsh’.
reportedly also an altered form of Flemish (Dutch) Broex, an old variant of Broeks (see Brooks ).

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Brooks was born on 6 May 1667, in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Gershom Brooks, was 43 and her mother, Hannah Eccles, was 20. She married Edward Bridge on 27 May 1690, in New Castle, Delaware, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 18 July 1724, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Brooks est née le 6 mai 1667, à Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Gershom Brooks, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Hannah Eccles, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Bridge le 27 mai 1690, à New Castle, Delaware, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 juillet 1724, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Brooks am 6. Mai 1667 in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gershom Brooks 43 und ihre Mutter Hannah Eccles 20. Sie hat am 27. Mai 1690 in New Castle, Delaware, Vereinigte Staaten Edward Bridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Juli 1724 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Brooks è nata il il 6 maggio 1667 nel Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Gershom Brooks, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Hannah Eccles, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Edward Bridge il 27 maggio 1690, nel New Castle, Delaware, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 18 luglio 1724, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Brooksが1667年5月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスコンコルドで生まれた時，父Gershom Brooksは43歳，母Hannah Ecclesは20歳であった。1690年5月27日にアメリカ合衆国デラウェア州ニュー カストルでEdward Bridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1724年7月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Brooks(이)가 1667년 5월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gershom Brooks(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hannah Eccles(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1690년 5월 27일 미국 델라웨어 주 뉴 카스틀에서 Edward Bridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1724년 7월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Brooks nasceu em 6 de maio de 1667, em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Gershom Brooks, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Eccles, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Bridge em 27 de maio de 1690, em New Castle, Delaware, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de julho de 1724, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Brooks родилась 6 мая 1667 г. в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Gershom Brooks было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Hannah Eccles, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Bridge 27 мая 1690 г. в местности ню кастл, Делавэр, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 18 июля 1724 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Brooks nació el 6 de mayo de 1667, en Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Gershom Brooks, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Hannah Eccles, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Edward Bridge el 27 de mayo de 1690, en New Castle, Delaware, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 18 de julio de 1724, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 57 años.
